package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for http_handler_missing_security_headers: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: HTTP handler functions that write responses without setting `X-Content-Type-Options`, `X-Frame-Options`, or `Content-Security-Policy` headers (or without security header middleware)
type CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersModel
}

type CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeaders(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpHandlerMissingSecurityHeadersDTO) error {
    focus := "http_handler_missing_security_headers"
    _ = focus
    c.Header("X-User-Name", input)
    http_handler_missing_security_headers_positive := map[string]int{"http": 1, "handler": 2, "missing": 3, "security": 4, "headers": 5}
    http_handler_missing_security_headers_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_positive_0 := http_handler_missing_security_headers_positive["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_positive_0
    handler_positive_1 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_1
    missing_positive_2 := http_handler_missing_security_headers_positive["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_positive_2
    security_positive_3 := map[string]string{"security": input}
    _ = security_positive_3
    headers_positive_4 := http_handler_missing_security_headers_positive["headers"] + len(input)
    _ = headers_positive_4
    return nil
}
